svg.text: Click any component to explore further

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the universal ask bar work? What inputs does it accept?')
sendPrompt('What do session views show in this agent system?')
sendPrompt('How does the approval queue work? What UX does it provide?')
sendPrompt('What dashboards does this agentic system provide? Describe each view.')
sendPrompt('How does goal intake work in the control plane?')
sendPrompt('How are machines and workers registered and tracked?')
sendPrompt('How are agent sessions tracked, stored, and inspected?')
sendPrompt('How does multi-layer budget tracking work? Per task, goal, and machine?')
sendPrompt('What is captured in the audit log? How is it used?')
sendPrompt('How does goal decomposition into a task graph work?')
sendPrompt('How does the task graph work? What fields does each task carry?')
sendPrompt('How are task dependencies, fan-out, and fan-in handled?')
sendPrompt('When should you use fixed plans vs dynamic plans?')

svg.text: Layer D — Execution fabric & specialized harnesses

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the general dynamic harness used for?')
sendPrompt('What is the coding and delivery harness? What gates does it add?')
sendPrompt('How does the browser research harness work? What reliability does it add?')
sendPrompt('What is the document, contract, and ops harness? How does it structure phases?')
sendPrompt('What is the science and experiment harness? How does it handle reproducibility?')

svg.text: Layer E — Profile & skill system (loadable behavior packs)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the planner profile do? What tools and model does it prefer?')
sendPrompt('How does the reviewer profile work? How is it separated from the executor?')
sendPrompt('What is the browser operator skill profile? What special tools does it use?')
sendPrompt('What does the researcher profile do? What makes it different from a general agent?')
sendPrompt('List all agent profiles defined in this system and describe each one.')
sendPrompt('How does the memory system work? Describe hot, warm, cold, and episodic tiers.')
sendPrompt('What tool adapters exist? Describe shell, browser, document, and database adapters.')
sendPrompt('How does model routing work? How does it optimize for cost and task type?')
sendPrompt('How are task risk levels determined and applied?')
sendPrompt('How do approval gates work? What triggers them and what can the human do?')
sendPrompt('How do trust scores work? What is per-skill vs global trust?')
sendPrompt('How does idempotency work for external side effects like emails or payments?')
sendPrompt('How does the eval engine work? What categories does it cover?')
sendPrompt('How does gap classification work after a failure? What categories exist?')
sendPrompt('How does the one-change self-improvement loop work?')
sendPrompt('How does the incident and failure loop feed back into improving the system?')
